label: Form-Associated Custom Elements
summary: static formAssociated + ElementInternals make a custom element a real form control (value, validity, lifecycle). Native-first form-participation resolver for WE form-participating blocks (droplist, inputs, selection controls, #1272): blocks own value + validity through ElementInternals, demoting any polyfilled or wrapper-based form-value path to opt-in. Broadly available (all engines since Safari 16.4 / 2023).
